title: lilium pomponium var. carniolicum
intro: Lilium pomponium var. carniolicum, also known as Carniolan lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family and is native to the European Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lilium pomponium var. carniolicum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin irritations due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
